title: AI Auto-Tagger
description: Automatically tag responses using AI based on definitions you provide

tagDefinitions.title: Tag Definitions
tagDefinitions.description: Add a definition for each tag to tell the AI when to apply it
tagDefinitions.hint: Only tags with a definition will be considered by the AI. Tags without definitions are skipped.
tagDefinitions.noTags: No tags found for this form. Create tags in the Responses table first, then come back to add definitions.
tagDefinitions.definitionLabel: When should AI apply this tag?
tagDefinitions.definitionPlaceholder: e.g., Response mentions a billing issue, payment problem, or invoice query
